results.title: Heavyweight world champion Oleksandr Usyk is vacating all his belts, but insists he isn't retiring

results.title: Ceballos to leave Real Madrid a year early
results.description: Midfielder Dani Ceballos will leave Real Madrid after a trophy-laden spell with the club, the Spanish giants announced on Friday."Real Madrid thanks Dani Ceballos for his commitment and dedication during his time defending our jersey, and we wish him and his entire family the best of luck in this new chapter of their lives," Madrid said in a statement.
